caption: A woman with long dark hair is seated in front of a backdrop depicting a lush jungle landscape with a waterfall. She wears a black short-sleeved shirt patterned with small white animal figures. In the background, a large logo reads "JUMANJI" in red and gold lettering, with the subtitle "WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE" written in smaller yellow text below it. The woman holds a small black rectangular object featuring a white "M" logo. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands. Initially, she looks toward someone off-camera to her right while holding the object with both hands. As the scene progresses, she lifts her right hand in a gesture and smiles, continuing to hold the object. By the end, she remains in a similar seated position, glancing toward the right and maintaining her smile.
